nasb.text: He is clothed with a robe dipped in blood, and His name is called The Word of God.

esv.text: He is clothed in a robe dipped in blood, and the name by which he is called is The Word of God.

cnv.text: 他身穿一件浸過血的衣服，他的名字稱為“　神的道”。

ccb.text: 祂穿着被鲜血浸透的衣服，祂的名字是“上帝的道”。

csbs.text: 他身穿一件浸过血的袍子；他的名字叫“神的话语”。
